summary: Documented the qd completion report changedFiles[] deleted-file marker contract for implementors and orchestrators before qd complete --from-report.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md documents that plain completion report changedFiles[] entries mean existing repo-relative paths.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md now states that changedFiles[] plain entries must be existing repo-relative paths.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md documents that deleted files must be represented as deleted:<repo-relative-path>.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md now instructs operators to record deleted files as deleted:<repo-relative-path> instead of plain missing paths.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md documents deleted marker validity constraints.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md now states that deleted markers require a non-empty repo-relative path, no absolute path, no '..' traversal, and an absent referenced path.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: docs/ORCHESTRATION.md points orchestrators at the changedFiles[] rule before qd complete --from-report.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: docs/ORCHESTRATION.md now tells orchestrators to verify the QD_WORKFLOW changedFiles[] path contract before completing from a report.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Node evidence and qd-compatible completion/audit reports are recorded under the node-scoped evidence and reports directories.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Documentation-only qd runbook update; repository report and check gates are sufficient.
